title: SMC live-overlay payload (smc-live-overlay/1)
description: Flat, Pine-friendly live-overlay payload served at GET /smc_live. It augments the 2x/day baked mp.* baseline that SMC_TV_Bridge.pine already carries. Every data field is optional and nullable: an absent or null field means the overlay has nothing fresher to say and Pine falls back to the baked mp.* value. The overlay may only add or tighten signals, never loosen them; a stale or unreachable endpoint degrades silently to the baked baseline.

schema.description: Contract identifier; consumers reject payloads whose schema they do not understand.

symbol.description: Ticker the overlay describes, e.g. NVDA.

tf.description: Chart timeframe the overlay was requested for. Currently all values are served from the same 1-minute bar computation; multi-timeframe aggregation is not yet implemented.

asof_ts.description: Unix epoch seconds at which the overlay was produced. Pine compares this against OVERLAY_MAX_AGE_SEC to decide freshness.

stale.description: Server-side freshness verdict. True means the producer already knows the payload is older than its target refresh budget; Pine must treat the overlay as fallback-only.

news_strength.description: B1. On-demand news intensity in [0,1] (live snapshot, ~5min fresh). Null when no fresh reading is available.

news_bias.description: B1. Directional news bias from the live snapshot. Null when undetermined.

flow_rel_vol.description: B1. Relative volume vs baseline (>=0). Null when not served fresh (then Pine uses baked mp.flow_rel_vol).

squeeze_on.description: B1. Volatility-squeeze flag derived from the live volume regime (1=on, 0=off). Null when not served fresh.

vix_level.description: B2. Spot VIX level (>=0) from the dedicated market-wide ^VIX quote path. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine uses the baked mp.* VIX baseline).

flow_delta_proxy_pct.description: B2. Signed order-flow delta proxy in percent from the live microstructure read. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine uses baked mp.* delta-proxy).

ats_state.description: B2. Average-trade-size regime label (e.g. SPIKE_UP/ELEVATED/NEUTRAL) from the live microstructure read. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine uses baked mp.* ats_state).

ats_zscore.description: B2. Average-trade-size z-score vs the 20-day baseline from the live microstructure read. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine uses baked mp.* ats_zscore).

tone.description: B2. Aggregate market-tone label from the live snapshot. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine uses the baked mp.* tone).

global_heat.description: B2/C. Aggregate directional heat in [-1,1] (0.7*signed-tech + 0.3*signed-news) from the live snapshot, derived through the same layering as the baked mp.* GLOBAL_HEAT. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine uses the baked mp.* global_heat).

event_window_state.description: Event-risk. Macro/earnings event-window state for the symbol (CLEAR/PRE_EVENT/ACTIVE/COOLDOWN) from the event calendar. Absent (or null) when not served fresh (then Pine keeps the baked mp.* event posture).

event_risk_level.description: Event-risk. Aggregate event-risk level for the symbol (NONE/LOW/ELEVATED/HIGH). Absent (or null) when not served fresh.

next_event_name.description: Event-risk. Human-readable name of the next known risk event for the symbol (e.g. an earnings announcement). Absent (or null) when none is known or not served fresh.

next_event_time.description: Event-risk. Time-of-day label of the next known risk event for the symbol (e.g. "14:00", exchange-local). Absent (or null) when none is known or not served fresh.

market_event_blocked.description: Event-risk. True when a market-wide event window blocks new entries. Absent (or null) when not served fresh; the overlay may only assert a block, never lift the baked posture.

symbol_event_blocked.description: Event-risk. True when a symbol-specific event window (e.g. earnings inside the guard window) blocks new entries. Absent (or null) when not served fresh; the overlay may only assert a block, never lift the baked posture.

event_provider_status.description: Event-risk. Health of the event-calendar/news provider (ok/no_data/calendar_missing/news_missing). Absent (or null) when not served fresh.
